jobs.title: Shift leader Assemblaggio / Imballo (80-100%)
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the assembly and packaging areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to operators (Assembly, Packaging) during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles by gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles - Experience in the electromechanical field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent Please note that applications and CVs should be submitted in English. More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB aiutiamo le industrie a essere più efficienti e sostenibili: ogni persona qui contribuisce a farlo accadere. Avrai il potere di guidare, il supporto per crescere e la soddisfazione dell’impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiutaci a far funzionare ciò che fa funzionare il mondo. Posizione che riporta a: Production Supervisor Job Summary Contribuisce a garantire un ambiente di lavoro sicuro nel rispetto delle linee guida aziendali, assicurando il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di Produzione durante il turno. Supporta i Production Supervisor nel coordinamento quotidiano delle attività operative, fornendo assistenza tecnica agli operatori nelle aree di assemblaggio e imballaggio. Il modello di lavoro per questo ruolo è on-site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitorare e garantire il rispetto delle linee guida di sicurezza ABB e del Codice di Condotta durante il turno - Supportare il Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor per garantire la corretta esecuzione delle attività produttive - Fornire supporto tecnico agli operatori (Assemblaggio, Imballaggio) durante le operazioni quotidiane - Agire come punto di riferimento per la formazione on-the-job del personale di produzione - Essere il primo livello di contatto per le problematiche operative da escalare al Production Supervisor di riferimento - Partecipare ai Q Circles di Livello 1 raccogliendo le problematiche tecniche e di qualità e comunicandole al supervisore di competenza License to Operate / Core Values - Garantire che tutto il personale (nell’area di responsabilità) comprenda i valori fondamentali di ABB e gli standard di sicurezza e integrità del gruppo, agendo di conseguenza - Implementare e garantire il rispetto del Codice di Condotta, degli strumenti, delle policy e dei processi ABB nell’area assegnata Collaboration / Leadership - Promuovere e abilitare la collaborazione all’interno delle aree di lavoro interessate - Gestire i rapporti con gli stakeholder nell’area di responsabilità e garantire l’allineamento Professional Skills and Experience - Minimo 2-3 anni di esperienza in ambito operations, con esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento - Esperienza nel campo elettromeccanico - Precedente esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento team è considerata un plus Education - Diploma di scuola professionale o equivalente Si prega di inviare candidature e CV in inglese. More About Us ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione dell’energia per data center, impianti industriali e di produzione, infrastrutture critiche ed edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano a stretto contatto con partner industriali, erogando soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione include interruttori industriali, sistemi bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L’unità Power Protection supporta le più grandi aziende di data center al mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate ad alta efficienza energetica. ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione offre una piattaforma scalabile e di facile uso che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Il processo di selezione è gestito da Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Costruire un futuro più pulito e intelligente richiede ogni tipo di mente: i curiosi, i coraggiosi e i creativi. Per questo diamo il benvenuto a persone di ogni background ed esperienza. Pronto a fare la differenza? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per saperne di più sull’impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, schlanker und sauberer zu arbeiten – und jede einzelne Person hier macht das möglich. Du wirst befähigt zu führen, unterstützt beim Wachstum und kannst stolz auf die gemeinsame Wirkung sein. Schließe dich uns an und hilf mit, das zum Laufen zu bringen, was die Welt am Laufen hält. Diese Position berichtet an: Production Supervisor Job Summary Trägt dazu bei, eine sichere Arbeitsumgebung gemäß den Unternehmensrichtlinien sicherzustellen und die Erreichung der Produktionsziele während der Schicht zu garantieren. Unterstützt die Produktionsleiter bei der täglichen Koordination der operativen Aktivitäten und bietet den Mitarbeitenden in den Bereichen Montage und Verpackung technische Unterstützung. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist vor Ort: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Überwachung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der ABB-Sicherheitsrichtlinien und des Verhaltenskodex während der Schicht - Unterstützung des Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor zur Sicherstellung der korrekten Durchführung der Produktionsaktivitäten - Erbringung technischer Unterstützung für Mitarbeitende (Montage, Verpackung) während des täglichen Betriebs - Funktion als Ansprechperson für das On-the-Job-Training des Produktionspersonals - Erste Eskalationsstufe für betriebliche Probleme, die an den zuständigen Production Supervisor weitergeleitet werden - Teilnahme an Q-Circles der Stufe 1 durch Erfassung technischer und qualitätsrelevanter Themen und Weitergabe an den zuständigen Supervisor License to Operate / Core Values - Sicherstellung, dass alle Mitarbeitenden (im Verantwortungsbereich) die Kernwerte von ABB sowie die Sicherheits- und Integritätsstandards der Gruppe verstehen und entsprechend handeln - Implementierung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung des ABB-Verhaltenskodex, der Tools, Richtlinien und Prozesse im zugewiesenen Bereich Collaboration / Leadership - Förderung und Ermöglichung von Zusammenarbeit innerhalb der relevanten Arbeitsbereiche - Management der Beziehungen zu Stakeholdern im Verantwortungsbereich und Sicherstellung der Ausrichtung Professional Skills and Experience - Mindestens 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung im Operationsbereich, mit Erfahrung in Koordinationsfunktionen - Erfahrung im elektromechanischen Bereich - Frühere Erfahrung in Teamkoordinationsfunktionen ist von Vorteil Education - Berufliche Fachschule oder gleichwertiger Abschluss Bitte beachte, dass Bewerbungen und Lebensläufe auf Englisch eingereicht werden sollten. More About Us ABB Smart Power bietet Energieverteilungslösungen für Rechenzentren, Industrie- und Fertigungsanlagen, kritische Infrastrukturen sowie kommerzielle Gebäude. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst Industrieschalter, Niederspannungssysteme, Motorstartanwendungen sowie Sicherheitsgeräte wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power-Protection-Einheit unterstützt die weltweit größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit fortschrittlichen, energieeffizienten USV-Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager der Division bietet eine skalierbare, benutzerfreundliche Plattform, die Organisationen hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO₂-Emissionen zu reduzieren. Der Rekrutierungsprozess wird von Mara Werne, Talent Partner, verwaltet. Eine sauberere, intelligentere Zukunft zu bauen erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, die Mutigen und die Kreativen. Deshalb heißen wir Menschen aller Hintergründe und Erfahrungen willkommen. Bereit, etwas zu bewirken? Bewirb dich noch heute oder besuche https://www.abb.com, um mehr über die globale Wirkung unserer Lösungen zu erfahren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à devenir plus efficientes et plus propres – et chaque personne ici y contribue. Tu seras habilité à diriger, soutenu pour progresser et fier de l’impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoins-nous et aide à faire tourner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste relève de: Production Supervisor Job Summary Contribue à garantir un environnement de travail sûr conformément aux directives de l’entreprise, en assurant l’atteinte des objectifs de production pendant le quart. Soutient les superviseurs de production dans la coordination quotidienne des activités opérationnelles, en apportant une assistance technique aux opérateurs des zones d’assemblage et d’empaquetage. Le modèle de travail pour ce rôle est sur site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Surveiller et garantir le respect des directives de sécurité ABB et du Code de conduite pendant le quart - Soutenir le Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor pour assurer l’exécution correcte des activités de production - Fournir un support technique aux opérateurs (Assemblage, Empaquetage) durant les opérations quotidiennes - Servir de référent pour la formation en situation de travail du personnel de production - Constituer le premier niveau de contact pour les problèmes opérationnels à escalader vers le Production Supervisor concerné - Participer aux Q Circles de niveau 1 en recensant les problèmes techniques et qualité et en les communiquant au superviseur approprié License to Operate / Core Values - Garantir que tout le personnel (dans la zone de responsabilité) comprenne les valeurs fondamentales d’ABB et les standards de sécurité et d’intégrité du groupe, et agir en conséquence - Mettre en œuvre et garantir le respect du Code de conduite, des outils, politiques et processus ABB dans la zone assignée Collaboration / Leadership - Promouvoir et permettre la collaboration au sein des zones de travail concernées - Gérer les relations avec les parties prenantes dans la zone de responsabilité et assurer l’alignement Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 ans d’expérience en opérations, avec expérience en rôles de coordination - Expérience dans le domaine électromécanique - Une expérience antérieure en rôles de coordination d’équipe est un plus Education - Diplôme d’école professionnelle ou équivalent Veuillez noter que les candidatures et CV doivent être soumis en anglais. More About Us ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d’énergie pour les data centers, les usines industrielles et manufacturières, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la Division collaborent étroitement avec des partenaires industriels, fournissant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la Division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage moteur et des dispositifs de sécurité comme des interrupteurs et relais. Son unité Power Protection soutient les plus grandes entreprises de data centers au monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et écoénergétiques. L’ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la Division offre une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser l’énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO₂. Le processus de recrutement est géré par Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent demande toutes sortes d’esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C’est pourquoi nous accueillons des personnes de tous horizons et expériences. Prêt à avoir un impact ? Postule dès aujourd’hui ou visite https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l’impact de nos solutions à travers le monde.

jobs.title: (80 - 100%) R&D Engineer (Energy Storage Systems)
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Chapter Lead, Electronics HW __ You will utilize your extensive skills and technical expertise to select and qualify potential Energy Storage Systems and their manufacturers, ensure Uninterruptable Power Supplies (UPS) compatibility with those. You will further support us with new emerging applications around multifunction UPS for ancillary services such as frequency response and peak shaving. The work model for the role is: #LI-Hybrid You will be mainly accountable for: - Lead technical qualification of Energy Storage Systems (eg. battery cells, battery racks, Battery Management Systems, etc.) - Support supplier qualification - Support certification of batteries and systems for the American and IEC standards - Support on new emerging applications and technical know-how on batteries - Identify and communicate energy storage requirements Qualifications for the role: - Master or Bachelor degree in Electrical Engineering, as well as more than 3 years of relevant Engineering experience - Must have experience working with electrical systems or demonstrate the aptitude to learn complex power electronic systems - Must have experience with energy storage systems and batteries - Self-driven and responsible, well-structured work practices - Can break down complex topics into simple explanations - Collaborative team player - Knowledge and experience with Agile methodology is a plus - Fluent in English, spoken and written More about us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Critical Power unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. "If you want to discover more about ABB, take another look at our website www.abb.com. ABB Data Privacy Statement: https://new.abb.com/privacy-notice/candidate " Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB, aiutiamo le industrie a operare in modo più efficiente e sostenibile—e ogni persona qui contribuisce a rendere tutto ciò possibile. Avrai l'opportunità di guidare, il supporto per crescere e l'orgoglio di creare un impatto insieme a noi. Unisciti a noi e contribuisci a far funzionare ciò che fa girare il mondo. Questa posizione riporta a: Chapter Lead, Electronics HW Utilizzerai le tue vaste competenze e la tua esperienza tecnica per selezionare e qualificare potenziali Sistemi di Accumulo Energetico e i loro produttori, garantendo la compatibilità con gli UPS (Uninterruptable Power Supplies). Inoltre, ci supporterai con nuove applicazioni emergenti relative agli UPS multifunzionali per servizi ausiliari come la risposta in frequenza e il peak shaving. Il modello di lavoro per questa posizione è: #LI-Hybrid Sarai principalmente responsabile di: - Guidare la qualificazione tecnica dei Sistemi di Accumulo Energetico (ad es. celle di batteria, rack di batterie, sistemi di gestione delle batterie, ecc.) - Supportare la qualificazione dei fornitori - Supportare la certificazione di batterie e sistemi secondo gli standard americani e IEC - Supportare nuove applicazioni emergenti e fornire know-how tecnico sulle batterie - Identificare e comunicare i requisiti per i sistemi di accumulo energetico Qualifiche richieste per il ruolo: - Laurea magistrale o triennale in Ingegneria Elettrica, oltre a più di 3 anni di esperienza rilevante in ambito ingegneristico - Esperienza pregressa con sistemi elettrici o dimostrazione di capacità di apprendere sistemi elettronici di potenza complessi - Esperienza con sistemi di accumulo energetico e batterie - Autonomia e senso di responsabilità, metodo di lavoro ben strutturato - Capacità di semplificare argomenti complessi in spiegazioni semplici - Spirito collaborativo e attitudine al lavoro di squadra - Conoscenza ed esperienza con la metodologia Agile è un plus - Inglese fluente, sia scritto che parlato Maggiori informazioni su di noi ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni per la distribuzione di energia a data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche ed edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione collaborano strettamente con i partner industriali, offrendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano una rapida crescita, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione include interruttori industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni per l'avviamento dei motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L'unità Critical Power della Divisione supporta le più grandi aziende di data center al mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate ed efficienti dal punto di vista energetico. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione offre una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. "Se vuoi scoprire di più su ABB, dai un'altra occhiata al nostro sito web www.abb.com. Dichiarazione sulla Privacy di ABB: https://new.abb.com/privacy-notice/candidate" Costruire un futuro più pulito e intelligente richiede tutti i tipi di menti: curiose, coraggiose e creative. Ecco perché accogliamo persone di tutti i background ed esperienze. Pronto a fare la differenza? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per saperne di più sull'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, effizienter und umweltfreundlicher zu arbeiten – und jede Person hier trägt dazu bei. Sie werden befähigt, zu führen, unterstützt, um zu wachsen, und stolz auf die Wirkung, die wir gemeinsam schaffen. Schließen Sie sich uns an und helfen Sie mit, die Welt am Laufen zu halten. Darüber hinaus unterstützen Sie uns bei neuen, aufkommenden Anwendungen rund um multifunktionale USV für Zusatzdienste wie Frequenzregelung und Spitzenlastreduzierung. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist: #LI-Hybrid Ihre Hauptaufgaben: - Technische Qualifikation von Energiespeichersystemen (z. B. Batteriezellen, Batterieracks, Batteriemanagementsysteme usw.) leiten - Unterstützung bei der Lieferantenqualifikation - Unterstützung bei der Zertifizierung von Batterien und Systemen nach amerikanischen und IEC-Standards - Unterstützung bei neuen, aufkommenden Anwendungen und technischem Know-how zu Batterien - Anforderungen an Energiespeichersysteme identifizieren und kommunizieren Qualifikationen für die Rolle: - Master- oder Bachelor-Abschluss in Elektrotechnik sowie mehr als 3 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung im Ingenieurwesen - Erfahrung mit elektrischen Systemen oder die Fähigkeit, komplexe Leistungselektroniksysteme zu erlernen - Erfahrung mit Energiespeichersystemen und Batterien - Selbstständig und verantwortungsbewusst, gut strukturierte Arbeitsweise - Fähigkeit, komplexe Themen in einfache Erklärungen zu zerlegen - Teamplayer mit kollaborativer Einstellung - Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit der agilen Methodik sind von Vorteil - Fließend in Englisch, in Wort und Schrift Mehr über uns ABB Smart Power bietet Lösungen für die Energieverteilung in Rechenzentren, Industrie- und Fertigungsanlagen, kritischen Infrastrukturen und Gewerbegebäuden. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst industrielle Leistungsschalter, Niederspannungssysteme, Motoranwendungen und Sicherheitsgeräte wie Schalter und Relais. Die Critical Power-Einheit der Division unterstützt die weltweit größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit fortschrittlichen, energieeffizienten USV-Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager der Division bietet eine skalierbare, benutzerfreundliche Plattform, die Organisationen hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO2-Emissionen zu reduzieren. descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à fonctionner de manière plus efficace et durable—et chaque personne ici contribue à rendre cela possible. Vous serez habilité à diriger, soutenu pour évoluer et fier de l'impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez-nous et aidez à faire fonctionner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste relève de : Chapter Lead, Electronics HW Vous utiliserez vos compétences étendues et votre expertise technique pour sélectionner et qualifier des systèmes de stockage d'énergie potentiels et leurs fabricants, en garantissant leur compatibilité avec les alimentations sans interruption (ASI). Vous nous soutiendrez également dans le développement de nouvelles applications émergentes autour des ASI multifonctionnelles pour des services auxiliaires tels que la réponse en fréquence et le lissage des pics de consommation. Le modèle de travail pour ce poste est : #LI-Hybrid Vous serez principalement responsable de : - Diriger la qualification technique des systèmes de stockage d'énergie (par ex. cellules de batterie, racks de batteries, systèmes de gestion de batteries, etc.) - Soutenir la qualification des fournisseurs - Soutenir la certification des batteries et des systèmes selon les normes américaines et IEC - Soutenir les nouvelles applications émergentes et fournir un savoir-faire technique sur les batteries - Identifier et communiquer les exigences des systèmes de stockage d'énergie Qualifications pour le poste : - Diplôme de Master ou de Licence en Génie Électrique, ainsi qu'une expérience pertinente de plus de 3 ans en ingénierie - Expérience de travail avec des systèmes électriques ou aptitude à apprendre des systèmes électroniques complexes - Expérience avec des systèmes de stockage d'énergie et des batteries - Autonomie et sens des responsabilités, méthodes de travail bien structurées - Capacité à simplifier des sujets complexes en explications simples - Esprit d'équipe et collaboratif - Connaissance et expérience de la méthodologie Agile est un atout - Maîtrise de l'anglais, parlé et écrit En savoir plus sur nous ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et de fabrication, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la Division collaborent étroitement avec des partenaires industriels, offrant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent une croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la Division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage de moteurs et des dispositifs de sécurité tels que des interrupteurs et des relais. L'unité Critical Power de la Division soutient les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données au monde avec des solutions ASI avancées et économes en énergie. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la Division offre une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. "Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur ABB, consultez notre site Web www.abb.com. Déclaration de confidentialité d'ABB : https://new.abb.com/privacy-notice/candidate" Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite toutes sortes d'esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C'est pourquoi nous accueillons des personnes de tous horizons et expériences. Prêt à faire une différence ? Postulez dès aujourd'hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l'impact de nos solutions dans le monde entier.

jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the testing areas. Your Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to operators (Testing) during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles: gathers technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and act accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles - Experience in the electrical/electronic field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent Please note that applications and CVs should be submitted in English. More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. jobs.title: Test Engineering Specialist (80 - 100%)
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Engineering Manager __ Your role and responsibilities In this role, you will have the opportunity to develop and maintain test infrastructures and test automations in accordance with business strategy to improve safety, efficiency, quality, and cost reduction. Each day, you will ensure existing test systems remain functional and up-to-date while designing new automated solutions for emerging products. You will also showcase your expertise by implementing innovative testing methodologies that enhance production standards and reduce costs. The work model for the role is hybrid. #LI-Hybrid You will be mainly accountable for: - Maintaining and improving existing test systems, both hardware infrastructures and software automations, ensuring they meet current operational standards. - Designing new test systems for new products in compliance with specifications and manual test procedures, implementing automation wherever possible. - Providing support for the integration and startup of test systems, defining action plans and training relevant personnel. - Identifying and recommending opportunities for improving test processes and implementing related projects, ensuring adherence to safety requirements and evaluating new technologies. Qualifications for the role - You have a minimum of 3 years of experience in UPS testing or commissioning, with proven expertise in test system development and maintenance. - Highly skilled in hardware design and automation software development, with the ability to create robust and efficient testing solutions. - Possess an enhanced knowledge of electrical infrastructures design and software development in C programming language. - You are passionate about workplace safety and technical documentation, ensuring all systems comply with safety requirements and are properly documented. - Degree in Electronic Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field. - You are at ease communicating in English, both written and spoken. - Nice-to-have: Knowledge of programming languages such as LabVIEW, Python, and C#, experience with programming IDEs like LabWindows CVI and VSCode, and familiarity with hardware design software such as Altium. More about us ABB Smart Power is a global technology leader, with products and solutions that make power supplies smart, connected, and protected. Its intelligent products and solutions make power more competitive by improving the energy efficiency, productivity, and reliability of almost any operation. We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe. #MyABBStory Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB aiutiamo le industrie a essere più snelle e pulite—ogni persona qui lo rende possibile. Sarai abilitato a guidare, supportato a crescere e orgoglioso dell’impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi per far funzionare ciò che fa funzionare il mondo. La posizione riporta a: Production Engineering Manager Il tuo ruolo e le tue responsabilità In questo ruolo avrai l’opportunità di sviluppare e mantenere infrastrutture di test e automazioni di test in linea con la strategia aziendale per migliorare sicurezza, efficienza, qualità e riduzione dei costi. Ogni giorno ti assicurerai che i sistemi di test esistenti rimangano funzionali e aggiornati, progettando al contempo nuove soluzioni automatizzate per prodotti emergenti. Metterai in mostra la tua competenza implementando metodologie di testing innovative che migliorano gli standard produttivi e riducono i costi. Il modello di lavoro per il ruolo è ibrido. #LI-Hybrid Sarai principalmente responsabile di: - Mantenere e migliorare i sistemi di test esistenti, sia infrastrutture hardware che automazioni software, assicurandosi che soddisfino gli standard operativi attuali. - Progettare nuovi sistemi di test per nuovi prodotti in conformità con le specifiche e le procedure di test manuali, implementando l’automazione ovunque possibile. - Fornire supporto per l’integrazione e l’avvio dei sistemi di test, definendo piani d’azione e formando il personale interessato. - Identificare e raccomandare opportunità per migliorare i processi di test e implementare progetti correlati, assicurando il rispetto dei requisiti di sicurezza e valutando nuove tecnologie. Requisiti per il ruolo - Hai almeno 3 anni di esperienza nel testing o nella messa in servizio di UPS, con comprovata competenza nello sviluppo e nella manutenzione di sistemi di test. - Altamente competente nella progettazione hardware e nello sviluppo software di automazione, con la capacità di creare soluzioni di testing robuste ed efficienti. - Possiedi una conoscenza avanzata della progettazione di infrastrutture elettriche e dello sviluppo software nel linguaggio C. - Sei appassionato di sicurezza sul lavoro e documentazione tecnica, assicurando che tutti i sistemi siano conformi ai requisiti di sicurezza e correttamente documentati. - Laurea in Ingegneria Elettronica, Ingegneria Informatica o campo correlato. - Sei a tuo agio comunicando in inglese, sia scritto che parlato. - Nice-to-have: conoscenza di linguaggi di programmazione come LabVIEW, Python e C#, esperienza con IDE di programmazione come LabWindows CVI e VSCode, familiarità con software di progettazione hardware come Altium. Più su di noi ABB Smart Power è un leader globale nella tecnologia, con prodotti e soluzioni che rendono gli alimentatori intelligenti, connessi e protetti. I suoi prodotti e soluzioni intelligenti rendono l’energia più competitiva migliorando l’efficienza energetica, la produttività e l’affidabilità di quasi ogni operazione. Valorizziamo persone provenienti da background diversi. Potrebbe essere questa la tua storia? Per questo diamo il benvenuto a persone provenienti da tutti gli ambienti ed esperienze. Pronto a fare la differenza? Du zeigst deine Expertise, indem du innovative Testmethoden implementierst, die Produktionsstandards verbessern und Kosten senken. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist hybrid. #LI-Hybrid Du bist hauptverantwortlich für: - Wartung und Verbesserung bestehender Testsysteme, sowohl Hardware-Infrastrukturen als auch Software-Automatisierungen, um sicherzustellen, dass sie den aktuellen betrieblichen Standards entsprechen. - Entwicklung neuer Testsysteme für neue Produkte gemäß Spezifikationen und manuellen Testverfahren, wobei Automatisierung überall möglich implementiert wird. - Unterstützung bei Integration und Inbetriebnahme von Testsystemen, Definition von Maßnahmenplänen und Schulung des relevanten Personals. - Identifizierung und Empfehlung von Möglichkeiten zur Verbesserung von Testprozessen sowie Umsetzung entsprechender Projekte unter Einhaltung der Sicherheitsanforderungen und Bewertung neuer Technologien. Qualifikationen für die Rolle - Du verfügst über mindestens 3 Jahre Erfahrung im UPS-Testen oder -Inbetriebnehmen mit nachweislicher Expertise in der Entwicklung und Wartung von Testsystemen. - Sehr versiert im Hardware-Design und in der Entwicklung von Automatisierungssoftware mit der Fähigkeit, robuste und effiziente Testlösungen zu entwickeln. - Vertiefte Kenntnisse im Design elektrischer Infrastrukturen und in der Softwareentwicklung mit der Programmiersprache C. - Du bist leidenschaftlich für Arbeitssicherheit und technische Dokumentation und stellst sicher, dass alle Systeme Sicherheitsanforderungen erfüllen und ordnungsgemäß dokumentiert sind. - Abschluss in Elektronik-, Computer- oder verwandten Ingenieurwissenschaften. - Du beherrschst Englisch sicher in Wort und Schrift. - Nice-to-have: Kenntnisse in Programmiersprachen wie LabVIEW, Python und C#, Erfahrung mit Programmier-IDEs wie LabWindows CVI und VSCode sowie Vertrautheit mit Hardware-Design-Software wie Altium. Mehr über uns ABB Smart Power ist ein weltweit führender Technologiekonzern mit Produkten und Lösungen, die Stromversorgungen intelligent, vernetzt und geschützt machen. Ce poste relève de : Production Engineering Manager Votre rôle et vos responsabilités Dans ce rôle, vous aurez l’opportunité de développer et de maintenir des infrastructures de test et des automatisations de test conformément à la stratégie commerciale afin d’améliorer la sécurité, l’efficacité, la qualité et la réduction des coûts. En savoir plus sur nous ABB Smart Power est un leader mondial de la technologie, avec des produits et des solutions qui rendent les alimentations électriques intelligentes, connectées et protégées. Ses produits et solutions intelligents rendent l’énergie plus compétitive en améliorant l’efficacité énergétique, la productivité et la fiabilité de presque toutes les opérations. jobs.title: R&D Certification Engineer
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: R&D Team Lead __ General information The R&D Certification Engineer plays a fundamental role supporting strategic technology direction working with the R&D Senior Certification Engineer, by assisting and leading part of certification activities and providing guidance to all departments on the application of standards and regulations related to ABB’s Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS) systems. Reporting to the CoE Laboratory Manager, you will support the R&D Agile Team’s by performing assigned tasks, focusing on certification activities tasks using technical knowledge in a structured way. Your responsibilities - Develop and maintain product certification for existing and new products, dealing with renewals and product design updates. - Develop and maintain all certification documentation, maintaining proper records, certification files, developing and improving these where necessary. - Work closely with product development team and manage test partners (UL, Intertek, Dekra, Eurofins, etc.) to scope and plan test programs to demonstrate compliance to IEC or UL applicable standards. - Carry out and monitor practical certification testing. - Constantly research the regulatory environment and facilitate discussions regarding changes in regulatory requirements. Your background - Technician diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electronics or Electrotechnics. - Minimum 3 years of relevant engineering experience, including work with power electronic systems. - Knowledge of product regulations and standards (IEC, UL); familiarity with LCA and Environmental Sustainability is an advantage. - Experience working with certification bodies and conducting certification-related tasks. - Hands‑on experience with laboratory measurement equipment. - Ability to work independently on testing and certification activities. - Availability to perform certification tests in external laboratories (travel required). - Proficiency in Italian and English for effective communication. German is an asset. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Chapter Lead, Electronics HW __ In this role, you’ll help run what runs the world, by taking on meaningful work that drives real impact. We are looking for an R&D Senior Hardware Engineer to join our Electrification business. The selected candidate will join a team working on High Power DC converters. The work model for the role is: #LI-Hybrid You will be mainly accountable for: - Critical member of the Systems and Electrical team, Work within a multidisciplinary team to develop world class mission critical power protection equipment - Performs a variety of complex technology and engineering assignments - Realize the design of architecture and technical details, the circuit simulation and the development of electronic projects which require knowledge of analog, digital and low power electronics - Take care of design optimization by identification of technical, architectural and circuitry solutions, exploiting the highest integration (mechanical part, electrical components, PCBAs, etc.) and collaborating with other departments involved in the Product Development Process - Carry out preliminary tests for design pre-validation - Support the Test Lab during all the testing phases, evaluate reports of Test Lab and Quality Laboratories and express your definitive opinion on validation of final product - Draw up the technical documentation of systems, components, and interfaces Our Team Dynamics Our teams support each other, collaborate, and never stop learning. Everyone brings something unique, and together we push ideas forward to solve real problems. Being part of our team means your work matters - because the progress we make here creates real impact out there. Qualifications for the role: - Bachelor or Master’s degree in Electronics or Electrical Engineering - 5+ years' experience with electrical systems and complex power electronic systems. - Experience in digital and analog circuit design and simulation. - Experience with EMI design and troubleshooting - Knowledge of environmental, reliability, and safety requirements for Industrial products. - Knowledge and experience with Agile methodology is a plus. - Excellent command of English More about us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Critical Power unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. Tout le monde apporte quelque chose d'unique, et ensemble nous faisons avancer les idées pour résoudre de vrais problèmes. Faire partie de notre équipe signifie que votre travail compte - parce que les progrès que nous faisons ici créent un impact réel là-bas. Qualifications pour le rôle: - Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en électronique ou en génie électrique - 5 ans d'expérience avec les systèmes électriques et les systèmes électroniques de puissance complexes. - Expérience en conception et simulation de circuits numériques et analogiques. - Expérience de la conception et du dépannage EMI - Connaissance des exigences environnementales, de fiabilité et de sécurité des produits industriels. - Connaissance et expérience de la méthodologie Agile est un plus. - Excellente maîtrise de l'anglais Plus sur nous ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et de fabrication, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la Division travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les partenaires de l'industrie, fournissant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la Division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes à basse tension, des applications de démarrage de moteurs et des dispositifs de sécurité comme les commutateurs et les relais. Son unité Critical Power prend en charge les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données du monde avec des solutions UPS écoénergétiques avancées. La division ABB CapabilityTM Energy Manager fournit une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production/Logistics targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the testing areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to testing operators during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of testing personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles: gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processing within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensuring alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, preferably in coordination roles - Experience in the electrical/electronic field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB aiutiamo le industrie a essere più efficienti e sostenibili: ogni persona qui contribuisce a farlo accadere. Avrai il potere di guidare, il supporto per crescere e la soddisfazione dell’impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi per far funzionare ciò che fa funzionare il mondo. Posizione a rapporto: Production Supervisor Panoramica del ruolo Contribuisce a garantire un ambiente di lavoro sicuro in conformità alle linee guida aziendali, assicurando il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di Produzione/Logistica durante il turno. Supporta i Production Supervisor nel coordinamento quotidiano delle attività operative, fornendo assistenza tecnica agli operatori nelle aree di collaudo. Modello di lavoro: presenza in sito #LI-Onsite Principali ruoli e responsabilità - Monitorare e garantire il rispetto delle linee guida di sicurezza ABB e del Codice di Condotta durante il turno - Supportare il Production Supervisor per assicurare la corretta esecuzione delle attività produttive - Fornire supporto tecnico agli operatori di collaudo durante le operazioni quotidiane - Costituire il punto di riferimento per la formazione on-the-job del personale di collaudo - Essere il primo livello di contatto per problematiche operative da escalare al Production Supervisor di riferimento - Partecipare ai Q Circles di Livello 1: raccogliere tematiche tecniche e di qualità e comunicarle al supervisore competente Licenza di Operare / Valori Fondamentali - Garantire che tutto il personale (nell’area di responsabilità) comprenda i valori fondamentali di ABB e gli standard di sicurezza e integrità del gruppo, agendo di conseguenza - Implementare e assicurare il rispetto del Codice di Condotta, degli strumenti, delle policy e dei processi ABB nell’area assegnata Collaborazione / Leadership - Promuovere e abilitare la collaborazione nelle aree di lavoro di competenza - Gestire i rapporti con gli stakeholder dell’area di responsabilità e garantire l’allineamento Competenze professionali ed esperienza - Minimo 2-3 anni di esperienza in ambito operations, preferibilmente in ruoli di coordinamento - Esperienza nel campo elettrico/elettronico - Precedente esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento team è considerata un plus Formazione - Diploma di scuola professionale o equivalente Più informazioni su di noi ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione dell’energia per data center, impianti industriali e di produzione, infrastrutture critiche ed edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano a stretto contatto con partner industriali, erogando soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio include interruttori industriali, sistemi bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L’unità Power Protection supporta le più grandi aziende di data center al mondo con soluzioni UPS ad alta efficienza energetica. ABB Ability™ Energy Manager offre una piattaforma scalabile e intuitiva che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Il processo di selezione è gestito da Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Costruire un futuro più pulito e intelligente richiede ogni tipo di mente: i curiosi, i coraggiosi e i creativi. Per questo diamo il benvenuto a persone di ogni provenienza ed esperienza. Pronto a fare la differenza? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per scoprire l’impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, schlanker und sauberer zu arbeiten – und jede einzelne Person hier macht das möglich. Du wirst befähigt zu führen, erhältst Unterstützung beim Wachsen und kannst stolz auf die gemeinsame Wirkung sein. Schließe dich uns an und hilf mit, das am Laufen zu halten, was die Welt am Laufen hält. Diese Position berichtet an: Production Supervisor Aufgabenzusammenfassung Sorgt für ein sicheres Arbeitsumfeld gemäß den Unternehmensrichtlinien und garantiert die Erreichung der Produktions-/Logistik-Ziele während der Schicht. Unterstützt die Production Supervisoren bei der täglichen Koordination operativer Aktivitäten und bietet den Testoperatoren technische Hilfe. Arbeitsmodell: Vor-Ort #LI-Onsite Hauptaufgaben und Verantwortlichkeiten - Überwachung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der ABB-Sicherheitsrichtlinien und des Verhaltenskodexes während der Schicht - Unterstützung des Production Supervisors zur korrekten Ausführung der Produktionsaktivitäten - Technische Unterstützung der Testoperatoren im Tagesgeschäft - Ansprechpartner für die praktische Ausbildung des Testpersonals - Erste Eskalationsstufe für betriebliche Probleme gegenüber dem zuständigen Production Supervisor - Teilnahme an Level-1-Q-Circles: Sammeln technischer und qualitätsspezifischer Themen und Weitergabe an den entsprechenden Supervisor Lizenz zum Handeln / Kernwerte - Sicherstellung, dass alle Mitarbeitenden (im Verantwortungsbereich) die ABB-Kernwerte sowie Sicherheits- und Integritätsstandards verstehen und danach handeln - Implementierung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von ABB-Verhaltenskodex, Tools, Richtlinien und Prozessen im zugewiesenen Bereich Zusammenarbeit / Führung - Fördern und Ermöglichen von Zusammenarbeit in den zugehörigen Arbeitsbereichen - Beziehungen zu Stakeholdern im Verantwortungsbereich managen und Abstimmung sicherstellen Berufliche Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung - Mindestens 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung im Operations-Bereich, vorzugsweise in Koordinationsfunktionen - Erfahrung im elektrischen/elektronischen Umfeld - Frühere Erfahrung in Team-Koordinationsfunktionen von Vorteil Bildung - Berufliche Grundausbildung oder gleichwertiger Abschluss Mehr über uns ABB Smart Power liefert Energieverteilungslösungen für Rechenzentren, Industrie- und Fertigungsanlagen, kritische Infrastrukturen sowie kommerzielle Gebäude. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio umfasst Industrieschutzschalter, Niederspannungssysteme, Motorstartanwendungen sowie Sicherheitsgeräte wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power-Protection-Einheit unterstützt die weltgrößten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit energieeffizienten USV-Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager bietet eine skalierbare, benutzerfreundliche Plattform, mit der Organisationen Energie sparen und CO₂-Emissionen senken können. Der Rekrutierungsprozess wird von Mara Werne, Talent Partner, geleitet. Eine sauberere, intelligentere Zukunft zu bauen erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, Mutigen und Kreativen. Deshalb heißen wir Menschen aller Hintergründe und Erfahrungen willkommen. Bereit, etwas zu bewirken? Bewirb dich noch heute oder besuche https://www.abb.com, um mehr über die globale Wirkung unserer Lösungen zu erfahren.

jobs.title: Contract Manager
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Global Project Operations Manager __ You are responsible for supporting sales and execution in contract and risks management and ensuring consistent management of all proposals and contracts. Define and deploy the best practices and guidelines to ensure consistent and complete preparation of global risk reviews. Oversight of the contract management process, bidding submission, contract negotiations and document management as required. Key Responsibilities - Responsible jointly with the Sales Responsible to develop project specific contractual strategies, risk assessments and corresponding cost provision considerations. Work with the sales and account management team on Frame Agreements. - Overviews the legal function in reviewing and commenting on the contractual tender terms and conditions and corresponding update of the Risk Review database. Actively participates in Risk Review preparation and meetings. - Support the continuous improvement of the contract and risk management process and other improvements (e.g. rev split agreement, etc.) within the Global Business Line. Develop and maintain contract and risk management training program and contribute to regular Sales Operations Handbook updates. - Support the handover of all relevant contract and risk management aspects from tendering to execution stage. - Participate in project reviews to identify contract and risk management aspects to be addressed and support definition of corresponding mitigation strategies upon request (e.g. notifications, claims, variation orders, etc.). Participate in lessons learned exercises to assess and outline the contract and risk management related improvement areas and to divulgate the improvement actions within the organization. - Support Legal function in handling formal dispute resolution (mediation, litigation or arbitration) as required. - Maintain overview and track all ongoing significant contractual issues and communicate with business partners and management on an ongoing basis. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between business and corresponding Group or Corporate function to address project related commercial, tax and insurance topics. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between Integrity functions to address project related integrity Qualifications - Strong expertise in contractual terms, frame agreements, and global risk review policies, with the ability to assess and mitigate contractual and operational risks. - Solid understanding of project management, project execution models, and financial implications (FCM) throughout the project lifecycle. - Proven experience in regulatory compliance, legal frameworks, and the application of both Common and Civil Law in commercial contexts. - Skilled in negotiation and claim management, ensuring effective resolution of commercial issues and protection of business interests. - Knowledge of business strategy, sales processes, account management practices, and engineering project sales channels. - Familiarity with relevant product portfolios and the capability to translate technical offerings into commercially sound contract structures. We empower you to take initiative, challenge ideas, and lead with confidence. You’ll grow through meaningful work, continuous learning, and support that’s tailored to your goals. Every idea you share and every action you take contributes to something bigger. Guide to the future. This is where innovation accelerates, industries are reimagined, and your impact powers the world ahead. Run What Runs the World. #ABBCareers #RunwithABB #Runwhatrunstheworld Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB aiutiamo le industrie a essere più efficienti e pulite—ogni persona qui lo rende possibile. Sarai autorizzato a guidare, supportato a crescere e orgoglioso dell’impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi per far funzionare ciò che fa funzionare il mondo. La posizione riporta a: Global Project Operations Manager Sei responsabile del supporto alle vendite e all’esecuzione nella gestione dei contratti e dei rischi, garantendo una gestione coerente di tutte le proposte e i contratti. Definisci e distribuisci le migliori pratiche e linee guida per garantire una preparazione coerente e completa delle revisioni globali dei rischi. Supervisione del processo di gestione contrattuale, presentazione delle offerte, negoziazione dei contratti e gestione dei documenti secondo necessità. Responsabilità principali - Responsabile congiuntamente con il Sales Responsible per sviluppare strategie contrattuali specifiche del progetto, valutazioni dei rischi e relative considerazioni sulle previsioni di costo. Lavorare con il team vendite e account management sugli Accordi Quadro. - Supervisiona la funzione legale nel rivedere e commentare i termini e condizioni contrattuali di gara e l’aggiornamento corrispondente del database Risk Review. Partecipa attivamente alla preparazione e alle riunioni del Risk Review. - Supporta il miglioramento continuo del processo di gestione contrattuale e dei rischi e altri miglioramenti (es. accordi di ripartizione ricavi, ecc.) all’interno della Global Business Line. Sviluppa e mantiene il programma di formazione sulla gestione contrattuale e dei rischi e contribuisce agli aggiornamenti regolari del Sales Operations Handbook. - Supporta il passaggio di tutti gli aspetti pertinenti di gestione contrattuale e dei rischi dalla fase di gara a quella di esecuzione. - Partecipa ai project review per identificare gli aspetti di gestione contrattuale e dei rischi da affrontare e supporta la definizione di corrispondenti strategie di mitigazione su richiesta (es. notifiche, reclami, ordini di variazione, ecc.). Partecipa agli esercizi di lessons learned per valutare e delineare le aree di miglioramento relative alla gestione contrattuale e dei rischi e per divulgare le azioni di miglioramento all’interno dell’organizzazione. - Supporta la funzione Legale nella gestione della risoluzione formale delle dispute (mediazione, contenzioso o arbitrato) secondo necessità. - Mantiene una panoramica e traccia tutte le questioni contrattuali significative in corso e comunica con i partner commerciali e la dirigenza in modo continuo. - Essere il primo punto di contatto e agire da interfaccia tra l’azienda e le corrispondenti funzioni di Gruppo o Corporate per affrontare tematiche commerciali, fiscali e assicurative relative al progetto. - Essere il primo punto di contatto e agire da interfaccia con le funzioni Integrity per affrontare tematiche di integrità relative al progetto. Qualifiche - Forte competenza nei termini contrattuali, accordi quadro e politiche globali di revisione dei rischi, con capacità di valutare e mitigare rischi contrattuali e operativi. - Solida comprensione della gestione progetti, modelli di esecuzione progetti e implicazioni finanziarie (FCM) lungo tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Comprovata esperienza nella conformità normativa, quadri legali e applicazione del Common e Civil Law in contesti commerciali. - Abilità nella negoziazione e gestione dei reclami, garantendo la risoluzione efficace delle questioni commerciali e la protezione degli interessi aziendali. - Conoscenza della strategia aziendale, processi di vendita, pratiche di account management e canali di vendita progetti di ingegneria. - Familiarità con i portafogli prodotti pertinenti e capacità di tradurre offerte tecniche in strutture contrattuali commercialmente solide. Ti diamo il potere di prendere l’iniziativa, sfidare le idee e guidare con fiducia. Crescerai attraverso lavoro significativo, apprendimento continuo e supporto su misura per i tuoi obiettivi. Ogni idea che condividi e ogni azione che intraprendi contribuisce a qualcosa di più grande. Guida il futuro. È qui che l’innovazione accelera, le industrie sono reimmaginate e il tuo impatto alimenta il mondo che verrà. Definition und Einführung bewährter Methoden und Richtlinien, um eine einheitliche und vollständige Vorbereitung globaler Risikoprüfungen zu gewährleisten. Aktive Teilnahme an Vorbereitung und Meetings der Risk Review. - Unterstützung der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung des Vertrags- und Risikomanagementprozesses und weiterer Verbesserungen (z. B. Revenue-Split-Vereinbarungen usw.) innerhalb der Global Business Line. Entwicklung und Pflege von Schulungsprogrammen für Vertrags- und Risikomanagement sowie Beitrag zu regelmäßigen Aktualisierungen des Sales Operations Handbook. - Unterstützung der Übergabe aller relevanten vertrags- und risikomanagementbezogenen Aspekte von der Angebotsphase in die Ausführungsphase. - Teilnahme an Projektreviews, um vertrags- und risikomanagementbezogene Aspekte zu identifizieren und bei Bedarf die Definition entsprechender Migrationsstrategien zu unterstützen (z. B. Benachrichtigungen, Forderungen, Änderungsaufträge usw.). Teilnahme an Lessons-Learned-Übungen, um verbesserungswürdige Bereiche im Vertrags- und Risikomanagement zu bewerten und Verbesserungsmaßnahmen in der Organisation zu verbreiten. - Unterstützung der Rechtsabteilung bei der formellen Streitbeilegung (Mediation, Klage oder Schiedsverfahren) nach Bedarf. - Behalten den Überblick über alle laufenden bedeutenden vertraglichen Themen und kommunizieren fortlaufend mit Geschäftspartnern und dem Management. - Erster Ansprechpartner und Schnittstelle zwischen dem Geschäftsbereich und den entsprechenden Konzern- oder Corporate-Funktionen für projektbezogene Handels-, Steuer- und Versicherungsthemen. - Erster Ansprechpartner und Schnittstelle zu den Integritätsfunktionen für projektbezogene Integritätsthemen. descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à devenir plus efficientes et plus propres — et chaque personne ici rend cela possible. Vous serez habilité à prendre des initiatives, soutenu pour progresser et fier de l’impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez-nous et aidez à faire tourner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste relève de : Global Project Operations Manager Vous êtes responsable du soutien aux ventes et à l’exécution en matière de gestion des contrats et des risques, en garantissant une gestion cohérente de toutes les propositions et contrats. Définir et déployer les meilleures pratiques et directives afin d’assurer une préparation cohérente et complète des revues globales des risques. Supervision du processus de gestion contractuelle, soumission des offres, négociation des contrats et gestion des documents selon les besoins. Responsabilités clés - Responsable conjointement avec le Responsable des Ventes pour développer des stratégies contractuelles spécifiques au projet, des évaluations des risques et les considérations de provisions de coûts correspondantes. Travailler avec l’équipe commerciale et de gestion des comptes sur les Accords-Cadres. - Supervision de la fonction juridique pour réviser et commenter les termes et conditions contractuels d’appel d’offres et la mise à jour correspondante de la base de données Risk Review. Participation active à la préparation et aux réunions du Risk Review. - Soutenir l’amélioration continue du processus de gestion des contrats et des risques et d’autres améliorations (ex. accord de partage des revenus, etc.) au sein de la Global Business Line. Développer et maintenir le programme de formation à la gestion des contrats et des risques et contribuer aux mises à jour régulières du Sales Operations Handbook. - Soutenir le transfert de tous les aspects pertinents de gestion des contrats et des risques de la phase d’appel d’offres à la phase d’exécution. - Participer aux revues de projet pour identifier les aspects de gestion des contrats et des risques à traiter et soutenir la définition des stratégies d’atténuation correspondantes sur demande (ex. notifications, réclamations, ordres de variation, etc.). Participer aux exercices de retour d’expérience pour évaluer et décrire les domaines d’amélioration liés à la gestion des contrats et des risques et diffuser les actions d’amélioration au sein de l’organisation. - Soutenir la fonction juridique dans la gestion de la résolution formelle des litiges (médiation, contentieux ou arbitrage) selon les besoins. - Maintenir une vue d’ensemble et suivre toutes les questions contractuelles importantes en cours et communiquer de manière continue avec les partenaires commerciaux et la direction. - Être le premier point de contact et servir d’interface entre l’activité et les fonctions Groupe ou Corporate correspondantes pour traiter les sujets commerciaux, fiscaux et d’assurance liés au projet. - Être le premier point de contact et servir d’interface avec les fonctions d’intégrité pour traiter les sujets d’intégrité liés au projet. Qualifications - Solide expertise des termes contractuels, accords-cadres et politiques globales de revue des risques, avec la capacité d’évaluer et d’atténuer les risques contractuels et opérationnels. - Compréhension approfondie de la gestion de projet, des modèles d’exécution de projet et des implications financières (FCM) tout au long du cycle de vie du projet. - Expérience avérée en conformité réglementaire, cadres juridiques et application du Common Law et du droit civil dans des contextes commerciaux. - Compétences en négociation et gestion des réclamations, garantissant une résolution efficace des problèmes commerciaux et la protection des intérêts de l’entreprise. - Connaissance de la stratégie d’affaires, des processus de vente, des pratiques de gestion des comptes et des canaux de vente de projets d’ingénierie. - Familiarité avec les portefeuilles de produits concernés et capacité à traduire les offres techniques en structures contractuelles commercialement solides. Nous vous donnons le pouvoir de prendre des initiatives, de défier les idées et de diriger avec confiance. Vous progresserez grâce à un travail significatif, un apprentissage continu et un soutien adapté à vos objectifs. Chaque idée que vous partagez et chaque action que vous entreprenez contribuent à quelque chose de plus grand. Guidez l’avenir. C’est ici que l’innovation s’accélère, que les industries sont réimaginées et que votre impact alimente le monde de demain. Run What Runs the World. #ABBCareers #RunwithABB #Runwhatrunstheworld Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite toutes sortes d’esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C’est pourquoi nous accueillons des personnes de tous les horizons et de toutes les expériences. Prêt à avoir un impact ? Postulez dès aujourd’hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l’impact de nos solutions à travers le monde.

jobs.title: (80 - 100%) Senior Power Electronics Engineer
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Chapter Leader Power Electronics & APM __ In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research & Development (R&D) team. You will join an agile, cross‑functional team of approximately 8–15 employees focused on designing and developing new products. This role is contributing to the Power Protection/EL/SP/R&D in Switzerland. The work model for the role is: On Site You will be mainly accountable for: - Working as an independent and reliable contributor in R&D projects with limited supervision. - Understanding and applying applicable processes, standards, guidelines, and requirements, including architectural and design constraints. - Driving the achievement of assigned targets (quality, time, scope, cost) and raising and addressing risks. - Design and develop power converters - Specify components and define technical requirements with suppliers - Support the overall design cycle of the new product, from simulation to validation and documentation, through design and test - Conduct and coordinate complex analyses, develop recommendations based on technology/engineering practices and business considerations - Support operations and after sales organization during trouble shooting phases - Plan and coordinate a range of complex technology/engineering activities Qualifications for the role: - Master in Electrical/Electronics Engineering with thesis in Power Electronics or Bachelors Degree in Electrical/Electronics and equivalent work experience - 6+ years of electrical engineering experience - Experience with power electronic design topologies, knowledge of UPS technology and familiarity with the power protection - Mastering simulation tools -MATLAB/Simulink, LT Spice- and programming language -C- - Good communication skills in English, both oral and written. Other languages are an asset - Significant experience in working within complex organization - Willingness to travel occasionally (10%) More about us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. We look forward to receiving your application. If you want to discover more about ABB, take another look at our website www.abb.com. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
